text.content:
Structure

The Order of Hermes unites magi under the Code of Hermes, divided into Tribunals and Houses.

Code Highlights

Do not deprive another magus of magical power. Do not spy on another magus's sanctum. Obey your Praeco at Tribunal.

Major Houses

  • House Bonisagus — founders of Hermetic theory
  • House Tremere — structured hierarchy and certámen tradition
  • House Flambeau — martial magi
  • House Merinita — faerie mysteries
  • House Verditius — enchanted items

Expand with your saga's House details from the Order of Hermes supplement.

Regional Tribunals

Each Tribunal governs magi in a region. The Grand Tribunal meets every 33 years.

Record your saga's Tribunal, Praeco, and current political tensions here.
